fields.label: Company
fields.description: Resolved from the linked EasyEcom Location's frappe_company. Recorded here for query convenience and per-Company isolation.

fields.label: Warehouse
fields.description: The Frappe Warehouse this row governs. Must belong to Company above.

fields.label: EasyEcom Location
fields.description: The EasyEcom location this warehouse maps to. Blank for internal-only / ERPNext-only warehouses (§8.4.4 — partial mapping is normal).

fields.label: Is Linked
fields.description: Computed: True iff EasyEcom Location is set. Maintained by validate().

fields.label: Inventory Authority (§9–§11 read these)
fields.description: Who owns inventory authority for this warehouse. Built and FDE-configured now (§8.4.2); the flows that act on these fields ship with §9 (PR / GRN), §10 (stock adjustments), §11 (B2B reservations).

fields.label: Inventory Master
fields.description: Which system holds the authoritative running stock balance for this warehouse. On a dispute or drift, the master side wins; the other is reconciled to match. Read by §9 / §10.

fields.label: PR Origination
fields.description: Who originates Purchase Receipts. 'EasyEcom GRN flow' = goods received in EE (GRN) and ERPNext creates the PR from the GRN event (§9). 'ERPNext direct' = PRs made in ERPNext, warehouse not driven by EE GRNs. Read by §9.

fields.label: Adjustment Origination
fields.description: Who originates stock adjustments — cycle-count corrections, damage write-offs, found stock, shrinkage. Distinct from inventory_master because a warehouse may have EE as the running-balance master yet still take adjustments from ERPNext (finance-controlled), or vice versa. Read by §10.

fields.label: Mirror Stock Reservations
fields.description: Whether an EasyEcom 'inventory reserved' event (stock committed to a B2B order before dispatch) is mirrored into ERPNext as a Stock Reservation Entry against the matching Sales Order. True where stock-promise accuracy matters (high-value B2B); False where the extra entries are unwanted churn (fast-moving B2C). Read by §11.

fields.label: Notes
fields.description: FDE-facing freeform context for why this warehouse is mapped this way.
